chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. B. A. No. S- 451 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Hearing of Bail Application 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of Bail Application 16-01-2023 Mr. Sajjad Muhammad Zangejo, Advocate for the complainant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Applicant and his counsel are called absent without any intimation. It appears that even on the last date of hearing, the applicant was not in attendance and his absence was condoned on medical ground subject to production of medical certificate. Today, neither counsel for the applicant is in attendance nor even medical certificate has been produced, which shows that the applicant is deliberately avoiding making his appearance before this Court. Hence, this bail application stands dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to issue notice to the surety of applicant in terms of Section 514 Cr.P.C for a date to be fixed by the office. JUDGE Ahmad
